name: workflow
description: Strict workflow protocol for handoffs, progress logs, docs, reviews, and ralph-style completion loops.

interface.shortDescription: Keep agent work continuous across plans, progress, docs, reviews, and handoffs.
interface.longDescription: A strict workflow protocol that stores repo-local agent state under .agent/, blocks ambiguous execution, records progress, runs plan/develop/test/review loops, and provides a ralph-style mode that continues until the objective is complete or user confirmation is required.
defaultPrompt: Use Workflow to plan this task before implementation.
Use Workflow ralph mode to continue until the objective is complete.
